final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era.

Style/medium: needs a children's educational knowledge card aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be single large knowledge card layout with clear title at top, bullet points listed alongside the illustration
Subject: must include the Battle of Red Cliffs story content, presented in cartoon story format
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" (title), story bullet points with punctuation preserved
Constraints: must be child-friendly, single card format, title clearly visible, key points listed with punctuation
Avoid:
